The '''''Coronet''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] that served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was destroyed by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces during the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
